name: fim_delta_windows_mixed
description: ModuleDelta (mode=1) — Windows agent incremental sync with file changes. Simulates typical delta after initial scan on a Windows host.
notes: Uses Windows file payload (ARCHIVE attributes, SID permissions, Windows paths).
Low data_size: typical delta has few changed files between scan intervals.
Tests that Windows-specific payload fields (array permissions, SID uid/gid) index correctly.
